title: Oskar's Kitchencraft
description: This is a mod for minecraft that lets you add realistic kitchens to your game. The mod includes many different "sets" of counters etc.
body:
About:
Oskar's Kitchencraft is a mod that adds a variety of kitchen counters, fridges, ovens and sinks. This mods fits perfect for you if you want a both working and cool looking kitchen in minecraft. The mod has both modern and more old style kitchen sets, but all of them fits perfect in the game. 
Versions ~~1.16.5~~ - 1.20.4.
 
Features:
- 20 different sets
- Every vanilla wood type + more
- Easy recipes (see in the image section, at my website or in game using JEI
- Both decorating and usefull cabinets/counters
- You can store your items in the counters
